title: AI and GenAI Startups
description: GTM strategy for AI products that need to move beyond novelty and turn technical strength into trusted pipeline.
buyerProblem: AI buyers are flooded with claims. The hard part is proving why your product matters, who it is for, and what changes after adoption.
usefulWhen: You have product-market fit signals but no repeatable pipeline
Your technical story is strong but the commercial story is fuzzy
You need to sell to both technical users and business buyers
proof: Operator-led work with SaaS, AI, and automation teams
AI-native workflows across research, enrichment, and reporting
